expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: The result explicitly frames the benchmark intent around preserving "Export entry points", "Scope boundaries", and "Format constraints" before drafting, and then assesses each: "### 1) Google Sheets export entry points", "### 2) Scope boundaries", "### 3) Format constraints (Google Sheets)". It concludes format constraints are "Not preservable from the provided evidence alone at Phase 1" and explains what Phase 1 must spawn to preserve them.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output stays in Phase 1 contract-check mode: it cites Phase 1 contract requirements ("Phase 1 only generates phase1_spawn_manifest.json...", "remediation is printed as REMEDIATION_REQUIRED"), notes the missing manifest artifact, avoids scenario drafting, and focuses on spawn planning/evidence sufficiency ("What Phase 1 should output... phase1_spawn_manifest.json ... Requested source family: Jira").
